IT Support Services I - Help Desk
10+ Years DevOps Architect | New York, NY (5 days onsite) | Contract W2

cloud.name: Openkyber
cloud.insight: With multiple recent job postings for PingOne Cloud Engineer, Openkyber is clearly focusing on strengthening their Cloud DevOps capabilities, reflecting their growth in the software space.
cloud.outreach: I see you’ve recently posted several positions for PingOne Cloud Engineers—exciting times ahead for Openkyber. Our consultancy specializes in helping companies like yours plan and optimize their AWS/GCP/Azure migration, ensuring you maximize your cloud investment as you scale. If you're open to it, I’d love to set up a quick 15-minute call to discuss how we can support your Cloud DevOps initiatives.

cloud.name: Northstrat Incorporated
cloud.insight: With Northstrat recently posting three Cloud/DevOps Engineer positions, it's clear you're scaling your cloud initiatives and could benefit from our optimization expertise for AWS, GCP, or Azure.
cloud.outreach: I saw the recent posting for multiple Cloud/DevOps Engineer roles at Northstrat, which suggests you're ramping up your cloud strategy. Our consultancy specializes in helping companies like yours plan, migrate, and optimize their cloud environments, ensuring efficient use of AWS, GCP, or Azure. If you're open to it, I'd love to set up a brief chat to explore how we might support your growing cloud footprint.

cloud.name: LightFeather
cloud.insight: With your recent posting for a DevOps Engineer, LightFeather clearly values cloud expertise, which aligns perfectly with our consultancy's focus on AWS, GCP, and Azure optimization.
cloud.outreach: I saw the recent DevOps Engineer posting, which indicates that LightFeather is ramping up its cloud capabilities. Our consultancy specializes in helping SMBs like yours plan, migrate, and optimize their AWS and GCP environments to fully leverage their cloud investments. If you're interested, I’d love to chat for 15 minutes about how we could support your growth.

cloud.name: Sage Credit Income Fund LP  (CIK 0002066368)
cloud.insight: With Sage recently raising funding, it's the perfect time to optimize your cloud strategy and maximize ROI on your AWS, GCP, or Azure investments.
cloud.outreach: Congrats on your recent funding round, Sage. This capital can be crucial for enhancing your cloud infrastructure to support growth and secure operations. Our consultancy specializes in helping fintechs like yours navigate AWS, GCP, and Azure migrations and optimizations seamlessly. If you're open to it, I'd love to schedule a 15-minute chat to discuss how we can support your cloud strategy.

cloud.name: 5TH CENTURY PARTNERS FUND II-A LP  (CIK 0002001923)
cloud.insight: With recent funding raised, 5TH has a great opportunity to refine its cloud strategy and maximize ROI in AWS, GCP, or Azure environments.
cloud.outreach: I saw that 5TH recently secured new funding, which is an exciting milestone. This growth often brings new challenges around optimizing cloud infrastructure efficiently. We specialize in helping companies like yours strategize and streamline their AWS, GCP, or Azure setups. If you’re open to a quick chat, I’d love to discuss how we can support 5TH’s cloud optimization efforts.

cloud.name: Climb Bio, Inc.  (CLYM)  (CIK 0001768446)
cloud.insight: Climb's recent funding success signals strong growth potential, highlighting the opportunity for us to help optimize their cloud infrastructure as they scale.
cloud.outreach: I saw Climb recently secured funding to fuel its growth, which must be an exciting step forward. As Climb navigates this growth phase, optimizing your AWS/GCP/Azure footprint could be crucial to maximizing efficiency and minimizing costs. We specialize in helping healthcare companies like yours streamline cloud migration and operations. If you’re open to a quick 15-minute call, I’d love to discuss how we can support you on this journey.

cloud.name: GuideIT
cloud.insight: With the recent hiring of a Chief Information Security Officer, GuideIT is prioritizing its cybersecurity strategy, which aligns perfectly with enhancing cloud security and optimization.
cloud.outreach: I see GuideIT recently brought on a new Chief Information Security Officer. This significant move signals a focus on strengthening your security posture, especially in the cloud. We specialize in helping companies like yours optimize their AWS, GCP, or Azure environments while ensuring robust security measures are in place. If you’re open to it, I’d love to set up a brief 15-minute intro call to explore how we can support your initiatives.
